CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2017 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-06-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Paul K. Lee, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Grand Electric & Construction Co.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Wilfred Hsu and Civic Plaza Associates, LLC
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.
Witness Jin Lee sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $10,500.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $787.50
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $735.55
Total Judgment in the amount of $12,023.05
That the plaintiff has a mechanic's lien on real property located at 53 Page Street, San Francisco, California, 94102 owned by the defendants Wilfred Hsu and Civic Plaza Associates, LLC. For the sum of $10,500.00.
That the property mentioned in the complaint and hereinafter described, or so much thereof as may be necessary to sell, shall be sold at public auction in the manner prescribed by law by the Sheriff of San Francisco County, California.
The lands and premises directed to be sold by this decree is situated in San Francisco County, California, located at 53 Page Street, San Francisco, California, 94102.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2017 Continued To May-10-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2016 Continued To Feb-08-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
